star_1.text: ads after every level. short levels mind you. maybe reduce it to one ad every two or three levels and you'll get more players. so greedy.

there's way too many ads in this game The constant glitching back and forth with between ads and actually playing the game you get more ads than you do the game if there was nine games before each ad this game would be overall five stars but it's only getting a one star because of the glitching and the ads

This is an great game but I'm at level 103. And the reason the level im at is so low is the game levels get so repetitive. I would be at a higher level like WAY higher if it wasn't so repetitive because its boring when all the levels are the same and the bosses aren't really bosses. Game could definitely be improved. I do recommend as long as you don't play too often or you'll realize how similar each level is to the others. :/

you guys could have done better, firstly the add to get people to download the game one of you played and INTENTIONALLY hit every wall losing rings I mean really you're more likely to get downloads if you did well and show people what they can earn/win, second you need to make different maps/levels rather than the same one repeating over and over, and finally if you're gonna make it a level based game when I level up it should either be harder or easier not exactly the same as when downloaded.

star_2.text: the things I really hate about this game is that the end bosses are mixed but it gives you small amounts of money each time. the rate should be based on how many rings you get and the x should be alot more then the starter bosses. on lvl 80 and I keep getting boring underpaying bosses. do better. also the tracks are very much the same!

Was an amazing game!! But one of the advertisements was an ad for a game called "Whos the Daddy?" I downloaded it because it was fun looking and I was bored. I played it, really good, but when i exited the app my phone changed and instead of swiping left and right it changed up and down. I was so confused and i tried to look for it on ths playstore, nothing. I got help from my sister and once she uninstalled it everything went back to normal. Please check your advertisements! Thank you!! :))

Surprised at how high this is reviewed. This game is repetitive. It's has the same 5 levels replaying for the whole game. No ads if you go offline though, this at least could sustain someone for 15 minutes before you uninstall it. The only thing that isn't repeating are the skins that you watch an ad for.

It has the potential to be a fun game. In the beginning it has the minimal adverts. I would say first 4 levels. Thereafter it's an advert after every single level. It becomes too much and you can only enjoy the game on aeroplane mode. Wish it wasn't so add loaded.

Don't get me wrong, the game is good. But the part that makes me give this 2 stars, is the part where you slide down a pole with your legs tied to the pole, and you have to grab the layers. I had to restart multiple times because I didn't get almost all the rings. One reason for that is that you don't have to control your stickman (let's call him Henry). You can literally touch the corner of your phone, and Henry would still move. Reminds me of the sensitivity setting in Doors.
pretty fun only if it had less adds like I clicked the screen and I got an add. It's pretty fun if you didn't have adds, I'd recommend turning off your wifi.

star_3.text: Guess I beat it. after you reach a certain threshold unless your gameplay is shoddy, you kind of can't lose. I reached the final boss and the game looped back to a lesser state. I could have stuck around and bought the expensive skins, but I'd rather chew off my fingers. for what it is it plays well, it's bright and runs great. but once you block the ads you will beat the whole thing in an hour.

Meh... It is an amusing little time waster, but once you have unlocked the skins (which I was able to do within a couple of hours) it's all just the same thing over and over! If the levels were more interesting and varied it would maybe make up for that but it seems to be the same few tracks on repeat! The goal at the end seems longer sometimes but that's about it. It's not a bad game at all! But certainly not a 5 star game either. Also, it's a massive battery drain! Mine dropped 30% in 45 min!

star_4.text: A fun game, a bit repetitive but a good way to kill time. Ads honestly aren't that bad, majority of them you can immediately skip out of. Be wary of playing it for long periods of time though, probably anything over 15 minutes. All the colours everywhere and the fast screen movements can make you a bit disoriented. I wouldn't play this game before needing to drive anywhere.

Very cute gate runner game, average amount of ads. Goal is to collect layered rings around your stick figure's head by accumulating layers, running through positive gates, and collecting lower leveled stick figures along your path. Those layers are then used to ricochet your person along a multiplier route and reach the boss. Colorful and engaging.
